categories.title: Threat Intelligence
categories.description: Daily roundup of active campaigns, IOCs, and TTPs from open-source and partner feeds — distilled to what your team needs to act on.

categories.title: 06:00 Daily Brief
categories.description: One email. Five minutes. Read with your evening coffee — be ahead of tomorrow. Plain text. No tracking pixels. No marketing.

categories.title: Defensive Playbooks
categories.description: Weekly deep-dives on detection engineering, incident response, and hardening guides — written for practitioners, by practitioners.

categories.description: When something breaks, we tell you why — with timeline, attack chain, and the lessons your security program can apply tomorrow.

categories.title: Vendor & CVE Watch

categories.title: Career & Community
categories.description: Curated job board, conference signal-boost, and analyst notes from the field. The defender community, in one place.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-58644: Microsoft SharePoint actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-25089: Fortinet FortiSandbox actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Fortinet FortiSandbox, FortiSandbox Cloud, and FortiSandbox PaaS contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized commands via specifically crafted HTTP…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-39808: Fortinet FortiSandbox actively exploited
briefings.excerpt: Fortinet FortiSandbox contains an OS command injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via crafted HTTP requests.

briefings.title: CVE-2026-45695 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.8)
briefings.excerpt: Kopia is a cross-platform backup tool for Windows, macOS, and Linux with fast incremental backups, client-side end-to-end encryption, compression, and data deduplication. Prior to 0.23.0, Kopia's HTTP server started with…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-14890 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.1)
briefings.excerpt: SGLang uses an expert-parallel backup subsystem that exposes a ZeroMQ PULL socket on a routable network interface that does not contain authentication or deserialization safeguards, allowing an attacker to provide a malicious pickle file…

briefings.title: CVE-2026-44632 — CRITICAL (CVSS 9.1)
